_meta.source: NIST CPRT — SP 800-66 Rev 2 framework (SP800_66_2_0_0), externalRelationships per element
_meta.note: Identifiers are VERBATIM CPRT element IDs (controls zero-padded, e.g. AC-02; Security Rule elements at CPRT granularity, e.g. 164.310(a)). Mappings are informative references (OLIR) — CPRT carries no exact/partial strength ratings.
